nasb.text: Again, the devil *took Him to a very high mountain and *showed Him all the kingdoms of the world and their glory;

esv.text: Again, the devil took him to a very high mountain and showed him all the kingdoms of the world and their glory.

cnv.text: 最後，魔鬼帶耶穌上了一座極高的山，把世界各國和各國的榮華都指給他看。

ccb.text: 魔鬼再带耶稣到一座极高的山上，把世上万国及其荣华富贵展示给祂看，

csbs.text: 接着，魔鬼带耶稣上了一座很高的山，给他看世界万国和万国的荣耀，
